children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than March 1 of each year, the Secretary of State shall submit to the Speaker of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate a report describing, to the extent practicable, any involvement of a foreign military or defense ministry civilian participant in education and training activities under this part in a violation of internationally recognized human rights reported under subsequent to such participation.section 2151n(d) of this title

children.heading: Form
children.label: b Form
children.text: The report described in subsection (a) shall be in unclassified form, but may include a classified annex.
